create.description: Allocates a VM from the pool or creates a new one for the requesting org

list.description: Returns VMs scoped to the caller's org

execute.description: Runs code or shell commands in an allocated sandbox VM

agent.description: Agent registry — register and manage agent images

register.description: Register a new agent in the catalog

instance.description: Agent deployments — deploy agents and manage instances

deploy.description: Creates a new deployment from a registered agent. Returns a deployment_id to use for all subsequent operations.

fleet.description: Fleet management — create and configure agent fleets

task.description: Task execution — submit goals, review plans, track results

approval.description: Approval workflows — review and approve agent actions

list.description: List approval requests with optional filtering by org, agent, status, task

create.description: Create a new approval request with PENDING status and 24h expiry

get.description: Retrieve a single approval request by its UUID

review.description: Approve or reject a pending approval request

list_by_task.description: List all pending approval requests for a given task ID

fields.name: resources
fields.description:
Resources are files written into /workspace/skills/<name>/.
Include "requirements.txt" to install Python dependencies at VM boot.

fields.name: scale_up_threshold
fields.description:
ScaleUpThreshold: when allocated/(warm+allocated) exceeds this ratio (0.0–1.0),
proactively create more warm pods. Default 0.7 (70% utilisation triggers scale-up).

fields.name: source
fields.description: Planning engine sends source/target, accept both
